patch.value: Complete scaffold capability matrix: --capability renderers/parser/preflight/services starters

Follow-up to pm-d1ig (schema). After schema lands, the scaffold supports 5 of 9 SDK capabilities (commands/hooks/search/importers/schema). Add starters for the four override surfaces so 'pm package init --capability' covers all 9: renderers (api.registerRenderer toon|json output override), parser (api.registerParser argv rewrite), preflight (api.registerPreflight runtime-decision delta), services (api.registerService named service override). Each has define*/assert*/run* SDK helpers already. These are GLOBAL-activation capabilities (renderers/parser/preflight in GLOBAL_EXTENSION_ACTIVATION_CAPABILITIES; services conservative), so unlike schema they activate appropriately. Defer until schema proven; override starters need careful design to be genuinely useful rather than noise.
